context: You are visiting a doctor at a clinic in Seoul. You are not feeling well and need to describe your symptoms.

exchanges.speaker: npc
exchanges.translation: Hello. What seems to be the problem?

exchanges.speaker: player
exchanges.prompt: Say you have a headache and a fever

exchanges.speaker: npc
exchanges.translation: Since when have you been sick?

exchanges.speaker: npc
exchanges.text: 알겠습니다. 다른 증상은 있으세요? 기침이나 콧물은요?
exchanges.translation: I see. Do you have other symptoms? Cough or runny nose?

exchanges.speaker: player
exchanges.prompt: Say yes, you also have a cough

exchanges.speaker: npc
exchanges.text: 약을 처방해 드리겠습니다. 하루에 세 번 식후에 드세요.
exchanges.translation: I will prescribe medicine. Take it three times a day after meals.

exchanges.speaker: player
exchanges.prompt: Ask if you need to come back

exchanges.speaker: npc
exchanges.text: 네, 일주일 후에 다시 오세요. 증상이 나빠지면 바로 연락하세요.
exchanges.translation: Yes, come back in a week. If symptoms worsen, contact us immediately.
